digest: 过去 30 天，共追踪到 20 个热门 AI 开源项目（主力语言：Rust, Python, TypeScript）和 16 篇最新 ArXiv 论文。GitHub 最热方向是「Agent 技能与工具」。

categories.name: 🧩 Agent 技能与工具
categories.desc: 把工程、产品、设计能力封装成可复用的 Skill / 工具模块

repos.name: mattpocock/skills/stargazers
repos.description: Skills for Real Engineers. Straight from my .agents directory.
repos.summary_zh: 用Shell脚本管理GitHub星标用户技能。

repos.name: Shubhamsaboo/awesome-llm-apps/stargazers
repos.description: 100+ AI Agent & RAG apps you can actually run — clone, customize, ship.
repos.summary_zh: 百多个可运行的AI代理与RAG应用，支持克隆定制部署。

repos.name: github/spec-kit/stargazers
repos.description: 💫 Toolkit to help you get started with Spec-Driven Development
repos.summary_zh: 帮助开发者快速上手规范驱动开发的工具包。

repos.name: openai/codex/stargazers
repos.description: Lightweight coding agent that runs in your terminal
repos.summary_zh: 终端内轻量级编码代理。

categories.name: 🔍 信息搜索与抓取
categories.desc: 主动抓取社区、社媒、网页、GitHub 等外部信号

repos.name: moeru-ai/airi/stargazers
repos.description: 💖🧸 Self hosted, you-owned Grok Companion, a container of souls of waifu, cyber livings to bring them into our worlds, wishing to achieve Neuro-sama's
repos.summary_zh: 自托管AI伴侣，支持实时语音与Minecraft交互。

repos.name: servo/servo/stargazers
repos.description: Servo aims to empower developers with a lightweight, high-performance alternative for embedding web technologies in applications.
repos.summary_zh: 为应用嵌入轻量高性能Web渲染引擎。

repos.name: firecrawl/open-lovable/stargazers
repos.description: 🔥 Clone and recreate any website as a modern React app in seconds
repos.summary_zh: 一键克隆任意网站为现代React应用。

repos.name: memvid/memvid/stargazers
repos.description: Memory layer for AI Agents. Replace complex RAG pipelines with a serverless, single-file memory layer. Give your agents instant retrieval and long-ter
repos.summary_zh: 为AI代理提供无服务器单文件记忆层，替代复杂RAG管道。

categories.name: 🧠 上下文与推理基础设施
categories.desc: 压缩、转换、整理输入，降低 Token 成本，加速推理

repos.name: upstash/context7/stargazers
repos.description: Context7 Platform -- Up-to-date code documentation for LLMs and AI code editors
repos.summary_zh: 为LLM和AI编辑器提供实时更新的代码文档。

repos.name: kvcache-ai/ktransformers/stargazers
repos.description: A Flexible Framework for Experiencing Heterogeneous LLM Inference/Fine-tune Optimizations
repos.summary_zh: 异构LLM推理与微调优化的灵活框架。

repos.name: ai-dynamo/dynamo/stargazers
repos.description: A Datacenter Scale Distributed Inference Serving Framework
repos.summary_zh: 数据中心级分布式推理服务框架。

repos.name: jmerelnyc/Talos
repos.description: GPU worker client for the Talos network. Pairs with your Talos account, serves open-model inference jobs over a WebSocket, and reports uptime for payo
repos.summary_zh: 为Talos网络提供GPU算力，运行开源模型推理并赚取报酬。

categories.name: 🎨 应用与前端
categories.desc: 面向终端用户的 AI 应用、UI 组件、聊天界面

repos.name: emilk/egui/stargazers
repos.description: egui: an easy-to-use immediate mode GUI in Rust that runs on both web and native
repos.summary_zh: Rust编写的即时模式GUI库，支持Web与原生平台。

repos.name: agentscope-ai/QwenPaw/stargazers
repos.description: Your Personal AI Assistant; easy to install, deploy on your own machine or on the cloud; supports multiple chat apps with easily extensible capabiliti
repos.summary_zh: 个人AI助手，易安装部署，支持多聊天应用与扩展。

repos.name: AIEraDev/Clypra/stargazers
repos.description: A modern video editor built with Tauri, React, and TypeScript. Focus on building free capabilities of premium capcut functionalities
repos.summary_zh: 基于Tauri和React构建的免费版剪映视频编辑器。

repos.name: videlalvaro/inference-school
repos.description: A hands-on Swift and Metal course for building LLM inference from first principles on Apple silicon, with 48 guided lessons, runnable exercises, a nat
repos.summary_zh: 用Swift和Metal在Apple芯片上从零构建LLM推理的实践课程。

categories.name: 📦 其他热门
categories.desc: 值得关注的其他 AI/ML 开源项目

repos.name: oven-sh/bun/stargazers
repos.description: Incredibly fast JavaScript runtime, bundler, test runner, and package manager – all in one
repos.summary_zh: 极速全栈JavaScript工具集：运行时、打包、测试、包管理。

repos.name: astral-sh/uv/stargazers
repos.description: An extremely fast Python package and project manager, written in Rust.
repos.summary_zh: 极速Python包与项目管理器，Rust编写。

repos.name: zed-industries/zed/stargazers
repos.description: Code at the speed of thought – Zed is a high-performance, multiplayer code editor from the creators of Atom and Tree-sitter.
repos.summary_zh: 高性能多人协作代码编辑器，支持实时协同编程。

repos.name: OpenCut-app/OpenCut/stargazers
repos.description: The open-source CapCut alternative
repos.summary_zh: 开源版CapCut视频编辑工具。

papers.title: PagedWeight: Efficient MoE LLM Serving with Dynamic Quality-Aware Weight Quantization
papers.abstract: Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) is a popular class of large language models (LLMs), offering high efficiency and accuracy. However, in KV-cache-intensive serving scenarios, MoEs often exhibit a tension betwe
papers.summary_zh: PagedWeight通过动态质量感知权重量化，高效缓解MoE模型服务中权重与KV缓存间的GPU内存矛盾。

papers.title: A Blueprint for Equilibrium-Based Differentiable Continuous-Variable Thermodynamic Computing
papers.abstract: To address the escalating energy and latency demands of machine-learning workloads, we introduce a blueprint for an energy-efficient and fast thermodynamic computing stack that leverages stochastic an
papers.summary_zh: 提出一种基于平衡态可微连续变量热力学计算的硬件蓝图，实现节能高效的机器学习。

papers.title: Physics-enhanced reinforcement learning for real-time optimal control of dynamical systems
papers.abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has recently emerged as a promising feedback control strategy for nonlinear and complex dynamical systems. However, RL algorithms are sample inefficient and require a large
papers.summary_zh: 提出物理增强强化学习方法，提升非线性动态系统实时最优控制的样本效率。

papers.title: Evaluating Open-Weight LLMs for Generating Structured Threat Information for Autonomous Vehicle Vulnerabilities
papers.abstract: Connected and Autonomous Vehicles (CAVs) rely on interconnected software and hardware components, including sensors, Electronic Control Units, in-vehicle infotainment systems, and telematics units, wh
papers.summary_zh: 评估开源大模型在生成自动驾驶汽车结构化威胁信息方面的能力与局限性。

papers.title: A Methodology for Auditable Trustworthiness Levels in AI Lifecycle Governance
papers.abstract: AI governance increasingly requires judgments about whether an AI system remains adequately trustworthy over time, whether observed changes are tolerable, and how such judgments should be documented i
papers.summary_zh: 提出一种可审计的AI生命周期信任度评估方法，支持动态监控与透明记录。

papers.title: When Does Muon Help Agentic Reinforcement Learning?
papers.abstract: Muon is competitive with AdamW in large-scale pre-training, but its value for reinforcement-learning (RL) post-training remains unclear. We study vanilla Muon in sparse-reward agentic RL through match
papers.summary_zh: Muon在稀疏奖励的智能体强化学习中表现与AdamW相当，未显著提升性能。

papers.title: PRISA: Proactive Infrastructure LiDAR Framework for Intersection Safety Assessment
papers.abstract: Urban intersections are among the most hazardous locations in road networks, posing significant risks to vehicles and vulnerable road users (VRUs) such as pedestrians and cyclists. The complexity of m
papers.summary_zh: 提出PRISA框架，利用LiDAR主动监测路口，提升多类道路使用者安全评估的实时性与预见性。

papers.title: When Do Multi-Agent Systems Help? An Information Bottleneck Perspective
papers.abstract: LLM powered multi-agent systems (MAS) have emerged as a promising paradigm for complex tasks. However, their advantages over single-agent systems (SAS) remain unclear, with performance varying inconsi
papers.summary_zh: 从信息瓶颈视角揭示了多智能体系统优于单智能体的条件与边界。

papers.title: An Exam for Active Observers
papers.abstract: Human vision is a closed loop: gaze is continuously redirected by intermediate hypotheses rather than a single snapshot. Decades of psychophysics and cognitive science have argued that this active obs
papers.summary_zh: 该论文提出“主动观察者考试”，检验多模态大模型在闭环视觉任务中是否具备类似人类的主动观察能力。

papers.title: ToolSciVer: Multimodal Scientific Claim Verification with Visual Tool Augmented Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Multimodal Scientific Claim Verification (MSCV) requires models to verify scientific claims using visually grounded evidence from papers, including figures, tables, charts, and textual context. Howeve
papers.summary_zh: 提出ToolSciVer，用视觉工具增强强化学习，提升多模态科学声明验证中视觉证据定位与准确性。

papers.title: DADiff: Diffusion-Driven Cross-Domain Policy Adaptation for Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Transferring policies across domains poses a vital challenge in reinforcement learning, due to the dynamics mismatch between the source and target domains. In this paper, we consider the setting of on
papers.summary_zh: 提出DADiff，用扩散模型生成跨域动态转移，实现源域到目标域的策略高效在线适应。

papers.title: Cluster-Aware Matching via Laplacian Optimal Transport
papers.abstract: In many applications of matching, the point clouds to be matched are not merely unstructured sets of points but rather samples from distributions with an intrinsic cluster structure. In such cases, as
papers.summary_zh: 提出拉普拉斯最优传输方法，实现保留聚类结构的点云匹配，提升区域对应鲁棒性。

papers.title: Harmonizing AI Safety Thresholds
papers.abstract: Frontier AI companies have published capability thresholds that differ substantially, making it difficult for third parties to verify whether a threshold has been crossed or to compare requirements ac
papers.summary_zh: 提出统一AI安全阈值标准，解决当前各公司阈值差异大、难以验证和比较的问题。

papers.title: Behaviour-Conditioned Neural Processes for Adaptive Residential Short-Term Load Forecasting
papers.abstract: Residential short-term load forecasting (STLF) is challenging because household demand is heterogeneous, temporally variable, and shaped by diverse behavioural routines. This work investigates whether
papers.summary_zh: 提出行为条件神经过程，将推断的用户行为模式嵌入预测机制，提升住宅短期负荷预测适应性。

papers.title: Learning Standard Model structure from LHC data with Riemannian flow matching
papers.abstract: In this work we demonstrate that a single transformer-based generative model can capture Standard Model structure spanning five decades of invariant mass, from the sub-GeV regime to the TeV continuum,
papers.summary_zh: ShellFlow利用黎曼流匹配生成模型，首次从LHC数据中统一学习跨越五个量级的标准模型结构。

papers.title: Improving Improved Kernel PLS
papers.abstract: Improved Kernel Partial Least Squares (IKPLS) algorithms 1 and 2 are among the fastest PLS calibration algorithms. This article focuses on two shared steps, the computation of the $\mathbf{X}$ rotatio
papers.summary_zh: 提出加速IKPLS算法中X旋转矩阵R与Y载荷矩阵Q计算的方法。
